title: Steam Armor makes equipped primary unaffected by effects

card.rawText: Equip to a primary creature. For 2 turn cycles, the equipped creature is unaffected by creature and magic card effects. Does not include this card.

effect.value: Equip to a primary creature. For 2 turn cycles, the equipped creature is unaffected by creature and magic card effects. Does not include this card.

plan.title: Steam Armor makes equipped primary unaffected by effects
plan.summary: Equip Steam Armor to a primary creature and verify the immunity/unaffected route is represented for two turn cycles.

notes: Read text first: Equip to a primary creature. For 2 turn cycles, the equipped creature is unaffected by creature and magic card effects. Does not include this card.

steps: Equip Steam Armor to player_1 primary.
Verify the equipped creature receives an immunity/status route.

expectedAssertions.label: Steam Armor static status route emitted
Steam Armor remains equipped in magic slots

manualVerification: Confirm this blocks creature and magic effects except Steam Armor itself for exactly 2 turn cycles.
riskNotes: Fixture is scoped to the deterministic headless route; red results should identify missing runtime support or assertion drift.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Equip Steam Armor to a primary creature and verify the immunity/unaffected route is represented for two turn cycles.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
